task_summaries.task_scope: Compare class-conditioned distribution profiles of backward packet length features across multiple dataset partitions preserving class labels and partition metadata.
Measure variance ratios and count unique values of backward packet length features controlling for class imbalance within each partition.
Assess sensitivity of backward packet length features to sampling bias and dataset partitioning effects under class imbalance constraints.
Evaluate local label-topology consistency around backward packet length features within each class to detect structural irregularities.
